title: Birdie, brick edition
goal: Visualize air-quality and encourage the family to open windows for a better indoor climate.
concept: A decorative canary sitting on a branch: when air quality drops, the bird "faints" and ends up hanging upside down, warning of high levels of CO2 and VOC, like a canary in the coal mine.
outcome: Increased awareness of indoor climate, and how low air quality affects concentration and physical wellbeing.
